sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91126" key="pternokope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτερνο-κοπέω</orth>, <sense id="n91126.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stamp with the heels</tr_> in a theatre, to show disapprobation, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:197" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.197</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.122</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
